name: Avery Dennison Corporation
description: Avery Dennison Corporation is a global materials science and digital identification solutions company. The company's products, which include pressure-sensitive materials, radio-frequency identification (RFID) inlays and tags, and a variety of converted products and solutions, are used in a wide range of industries, including apparel, consumer packaged goods, logistics, e-commerce, retail, industrial, and healthcare. Headquartered in Mentor, Ohio, the company employs approximately 35,000 employees in more than 50 countries.
